Lightweight Tritan cup and removable blades make cleaning easy, while the compact, stylish design delivers full functionality for daily use. 全新上市，专利 45° 斜角刀片，轻松粉碎水果、冷冻食材与冰块，完美保留食材原味。倾斜漩涡设计，让食材混合顺滑，10 段速度随心调节。轻调理杯、可拆刀座，清洗方便，操作简单，功能全面又时尚。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Food Steamer
programme.desc: Simplify meal prep with the 2-Tier Stainless Steel Electric Multi Food Steamer. Designed for healthy, fast, and versatile cooking, it allows you to steam veggies, fish, and more simultaneously, preserving nutrients and flavor. Compact and easy to use—perfect for a nutritious lifestyle! 使用双层不锈钢电动多功能蒸锅，轻松做出健康美味的菜肴。专为健康、快捷、灵活的烹饪设计，能同时蒸煮蔬菜、鱼类等食材，最大限度保留营养与原味。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ultimo Kleen 5-in-1 Laundry Pods
programme.desc: Say goodbye to measuring and mess – simply toss in this laundry pod and let it do the rest! 完美结合洗衣、消毒、柔软、除臭及芳香剂的5合1浓缩洗衣凝珠

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Nutripack Snow Fungus
programme.desc: Health+ Nutripack Snow Fungus is a non-cook fungus, ready to eat in just one minute. It contains 100% pure natural organic white fungus with no preservatives or chemical additives added. Health+雪颜银耳 ，免煮即食只需1分钟即可享用。100% 纯天然有机银耳，不添加防腐剂或化学添加剂

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE’s Bio-Ray Knee Guard with Tourmaline
programme.desc: The knee guard provides firm support and gentle compression around the kneecap to stabilize joints and reduce strain. Infused with Bio-Ray technology and tourmaline warmth, it promotes circulation, eases stiffness, and delivers lasting comfort. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear. 护膝提供膝盖周围稳固支撑与轻柔加压，分担关节压力，减少磨损。结合日本生化能技术与托玛琳微热作用，促进血气循环、舒缓僵硬, 让膝盖在日常走动、运动中都保持稳定与健康， 降低磨损和退化风险。 透气材质，天天戴都舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Kampo Premium Cordyceps & Bitter Melon Triple Cleanse
programme.desc: The bitter melon formula supports natural detoxification, helps balance blood sugar, and promotes healthy metabolism. The cordyceps capsules boost energy, nourish blood health, and strengthen immunity. Carefully formulated with selected herbal extracts and GMP-certified, these supplements are ideal for daily wellness and long-term natural health maintenance. Health+ 日本汉方苦瓜三清素帮你清热解毒、平衡血糖、促进代谢，Health+ 日本汉方至尊虫草胶囊补气养血、提升免疫力和精力。精选草本精华，GMP认证，天天养生也安心，长期调理体质更自然健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Krill Oil 180s
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2™ krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. It is pure, sustainable, and traceable from catch to capsule. Rich in omega-3s, astaxanthin, phospholipids, and choline, it supports heart, brain, liver, eye, skin, and joint health. Nature's Farm来自南极的磷虾油，富含优质Omega-3脂肪酸和虾红素, 有助于维持胆固醇水平、维护心 脏、大脑和关节健康！ 人体对磷虾油的吸收率更高，没有难闻的鱼腥味，软胶囊更容易吞服，一天2颗有助于维护整体健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Furi Knife Bundle Set
programme.desc: Slice, dice, and chop like a pro with our kitchen knives! 厨房刀片如同专业大厨一般娴熟！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - IRIS OHYAMA Dust Mite Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Powerful, lightweight dust mite vacuum with a smart indicator light for easy monitoring and dust mites removal up to 98%. 强力轻便的尘螨吸尘器，配有智能指示灯，方便监控，尘螨去除率高达98%。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - LAC Joint Protect
programme.desc: The jelly form LAC Joint Protec contains glucosamine, chondroitin, type 2 collagen, anti-inflammatory herbs, which help repair cartilage and relieve joint inflammation. It tastes good, is easy to take and convenient. Start ""refueling"" the cartilage and synovial fluid early so that the joints can be used for a longer time! 果冻形态的关节保健品，含葡萄糖胺、软骨素、第2型胶原蛋白、抗炎草本等关节保健营养素，有助于修复软骨和缓解关节发炎症状，味道好，容易服用又方便。提早开始给软骨和滑液“加加油”，关节才能用得久、用得顺！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Revival Shampoo
programme.desc: A breakthrough 4-in-1 formula that colors, nourishes, volumizes, and strengthens hair—while improving scalp health in just 5 days. Powered by Korean patented polyphenol technology, it offers safe, natural grey coverage without harsh chemicals, leaving hair darker, fuller, and healthier with every wash. Ellixi发量黑洗发水，采用颠覆性的4合1配方：洗头同时染发、护发、增发量并强韧发丝，仅需5天即可改善头皮与发质。采用韩国专利多酚技术，无需染发剂或化学添加，温和自然遮盖白发。结合多酚氧化着色原理与草本养护成分，让秀发一洗更黑、更丰盈、更健康。

programme.title: Double Target
programme.desc: After several American and British military personnel are killed in suicide attacks throughout Southeast Asia, the U.S. begins to suspect a plot by the Vietnam government. To uncover the truth, the U.S. army calls upon a former commando who is looking for his long-lost son in Vietnam. While his military commanders want to see the commando succeed in his mission, his political overseers have a different set of plans.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep3 - EP103
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - My Frozen Friend - EP113
programme.desc: Gronk runs into the Abominable Snowman.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep7 - EP107
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep7 - EP7
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Justice - EP115
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that justice is when we are all treated equally, regardless of our differences, and we must give and receive the same attention to other people. Respect is shown by good treatment, complying with the laws to live in peace! We will also understand freedom and how to use it intelligently.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Communication - EP116
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover the value and importance of communication. We will learn the correct ways to communicate and the main rules of the good listener. We will know in which sites we can raise our voice and when we should respect the silence of others. We will talk about rumours and how harmful they are for effective communication.

programme.desc: Join our dance party at The Farm. Dee shows the sheep how to get down.

programme.desc: This program specializes in recommending gourmet restaurants from every corners of Taiwan, bringing Taiwan cuisine to more people, as well as the moving stories behind the restaurants.

programme.title: The Second Husband - EP 84 第二任丈夫
programme.desc: Feng Shanhua overcomes various hardships even after being wrongly accused. This is a story of fate, love, secrets and forgiveness that stem from her relationship with her two families, one of her birth mother and the other of the mother who raised her.

programme.title: Past Life, Present Love - EP 10 奇爱游戏

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 68 真的出现了!
programme.desc: Hongjun confirms with Dashang that his mother had indeed scammed others, leaving him deeply saddened. To comfort him, Shuijing thoughtfully makes sandwiches just for him.

programme.title: Circle of Life - EP 3 生生不息
programme.desc: Every winter, a research team from the Liaoning Marine Fisheries Research Institute ventures deep into the frozen waters of Liaodong Bay to conduct field investigations. Their goal is to find the endangered spotted seal, that breeds on sea ice.Liaodong Bay, the northernmost bay in China, is also the coldest and most heavily iced coastal area in the country.

programme.title: Our National Park III - EP 1 我们的国家公园 III
programme.desc: The Giant Panda National Park protects approximately 70 of the country’s wild giant panda population. From natural treasures to flagship species, from living fossils to species endemic to China, countless forms of life share this beautiful homeland. In addition to filming the daily habits of giant pandas and their rewilding and release into the wild, this episode also captures alpine rhododendrons in full bloom.

programme.title: Double Target
programme.desc: After several American and British military personnel are killed in suicide attacks throughout Southeast Asia, the U.S. begins to suspect a plot by the Vietnam government. To uncover the truth, the U.S. army calls upon a former commando who is looking for his long-lost son in Vietnam. While his military commanders want to see the commando succeed in his mission, his political overseers have a different set of plans.

programme.title: Wanted Dead Or Alive
programme.desc: This movie features a character who is supposed to be the descendant of the character played Steve McQueen in the television series of the same name. And like McQueen's Josh Randall, Hauer's Nick Randall is also a bounty hunter as well as an ex-CIA operative, who is asked by his former employer to help them track down a terrorist, Malak Al Rahim.

programme.title: Minnesota Clay
programme.desc: Wrongfully imprisoned for a crime he did not commit, Minnesota Clay seeks revenge on the man who withheld evidence at his trial. The catch: he is going blind.

programme.title: Sonny Boy
programme.desc: A small-town crime boss accepts delivery of a stolen car, only to find there's a baby in the back-seat. He and his transgender wife cut out the boy's tongue and raise him as a mute accomplice in their crimes. When the grown "Sonny Boy" escapes and tries to make contact with the outside world, the attention he draws to his warped family results in darkly-humored mayhem.

programme.desc: Only Live Once takes a look at two events which are reaching their final phase. First, the indoor action takes place in Stuttgart's Porsche Arena, where the world's best bouldering climbers participate in the Annual Adidas Rock Stars.

programme.title: The Truth About - 2005 Ashes - EP15
programme.desc: The 2005 Ashes series was the most dramatic in the history of this long rivalry.

programme.title: Chill - Freeride World Tour - EP14
programme.desc: Chill presents spectacular action from Chamonix in France, the cradle of European freestyle in the high mountains. Landgraf, in Holland, organises the last leg of the Crashed Ice World Tour and Freeski Big Air from Zurich's Lakeside.

programme.title: The Inside Line - Honda - EP19
programme.desc: Honda, as a constructor, is no stranger to competition, notably in Formula 1, where it has been racing since the 1960s.

programme.title: The Inside Line - George Russell - EP17
programme.desc: We join more than 30,000 spectators in Zurich to watch some of the best Mountain Bike Dirt Jumpers in Europe square up. Andorra and the Pyrenees provide the background to the Slopestyle Pro of the FISE Games.

programme.title: The Truth About - 2006 World Cup - EP16
programme.desc: At the 1977 Open Championship, two golfing legends squared up. In the World Cup final of 2006, a footballing legend bowed out in disgrace.

programme.title: Chill - Mandurah Women's Wakeboarding - EP15
programme.desc: The best of women's wakeboard with the coming of the IWWF to Mandurah in Australia. The magnificent Italian island of Sicily welcomes the kitesurf world tour. And finally, incredible female surfers head for the beaches of Brazil for the Rio Pro.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Golf - EP3
programme.desc: Only two men have succeeded in dominating golf. Which one out of Jack or Tiger is the best of all time?

programme.title: Flashpoint - Tiger and Rocco 2008 US Open - EP9
programme.desc: Tiger Woods wins the 2008 US Open on one leg and Secretariat carries off the Triple Crown by a stupefying margin.

programme.title: Top 20 - Supernatural - EP122
programme.desc: The Top 20 is an exclusive ranking of the news or the champions who are causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: The Iconic - One Club Man - EP36
programme.desc: No player embodies the values of his club like Paolo Maldini at AC Milan.

programme.title: Football Stars - Club Hollywood - EP19
programme.desc: The stars of Hollywood are buying football clubs.

programme.title: Top 11 - France - EP5
programme.desc: TRACE Sport Stars takes over from the national selectors for the World Cup in Brazil. Top sporting celebrities pick the ideal team and choose the best 11 players of all time.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Real Madrid Player - EP34
programme.desc: Who is the greatest Real Madrid football player of all time?

programme.title: The Inside Line - Esteban Ocon - EP20
programme.desc: Esteban Ocon is one of the most promising young talents of Formula 1. The Frenchman has shown considerable talent since his early days and now drives for Alpine.

programme.title: Only Live Once - FMX Elite - EP18
programme.desc: We go first to Andorra, at the heart of the Pyrenees, where the FISE Games offers some of the best free sports in the world. Meanwhile, in Mexico, the elite of FMX show off their talents before an immense crowd.

programme.title: The Truth About - Jonah Lomu - EP17
programme.desc: Jonah Lomu changed rugby when he annihilated England in the 1995 World Cup. Another New Zealander, Peter Snell, put his country on the map more than 30 years earlier with his middle distance running.

programme.title: Chill - Mandurah Men's Wakeboarding - EP16
programme.desc: We are on the waters of Mandurah, in Australia, for the men's finals of the IWWF Wakeboard World. Morocco is our next destination for the kitesurf world tour, and we present Harley Clifford who storms wakeboarding.

programme.desc: The drivers and stables are the stars of F1, but the circuits on which they compete are just as important. We look at the greatest circuits of the discipline and what makes them classic.

programme.title: Only Live Once - FISE China - EP19
programme.desc: This week the best BMX riders in the world meet in Cheng Du, in China. In Austria, the biggest European youth event in mountain biking offers three days of pure action.

programme.title: The Truth About - Jesse Owens - EP19
programme.desc: At the 1936 Olympic Games, Jesse Owens delivered one of the greatest sporting performances in history. At the 1984 Los Angeles Olympics, the collision between Zola Budd and Mary Decker become the discussion point of the Games.

programme.title: Chill - Snowboard Big Air - EP17
programme.desc: We look at the art of preparing a snowboard for freestyle in the big mountains, and we bring you spectacular action of this kind on skis from Chamonix, with the best moments of the finals of the Freeside World Tour.

programme.desc: In 1974 and 1975, Muhammad Ali won two of the most emblematic heavyweight fights in boxing history, thus strengthening his status as the greatest athlete of all time.

programme.desc: In this episode, the spotlight is on the women of MMA, notably those who earn astonishing salaries, while we present to you Singapore's new boxing hope and profile Dillian Whyte, for whom life has not always been easy.

programme.title: The Iconic - Olympics - Cycling - EP11
programme.desc: Jason and Laura Kenny were the number one husband and wife duo of the Olympic Games, they directed a group of British cyclists on the track in 2008 and 2012, while Nino Schurter, the great mountain bike specialist, has a full list of achievements.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Pizza! Pizza! Pizza! - EP115
programme.desc: Shaq's favourite pizzeria is swamped with orders, luckily the Shaq Paq has nothing better to do that day, so they sign up to help deliver.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep8 - EP108
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep8 - EP8
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Communication - EP116
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover the value and importance of communication. We will learn the correct ways to communicate and the main rules of the good listener. We will know in which sites we can raise our voice and when we should respect the silence of others. We will talk about rumours and how harmful they are for effective communication.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Dignity - EP117
programme.desc: In this episode we will discover the value of dignity, finding that it goes hand in hand with self-love and self-esteem. We must value ourselves and respect ourselves first and then others. Being respectful is a rule to be able to live in harmony and dignity. It takes dignity to ask for forgiveness and to forgive!

programme.title: Mellodees - Hickory Dickory Dock - EP12
programme.desc: Mini Dee explores the inner workings of a clock in this magical adventure.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep16 - EP116

programme.desc: During a sailing trip, Von Bolt begins to malfunction, endangering ALVA and Edison, so the Secret Lab Kids investigate elements, compounds and alloys to diagnose the problem. / When a virus turns JD into a donut-craving zombie, Angie has to come up with not only a cure, but an inoculation against the virus. Fortunately, Jonas Salk can help.

programme.title: Mellodees - The Grand Old Duke Of York - EP27
programme.desc: What a great day! It’s time for an outdoor stretch. Can you sing ‘The Grand Duke of York’? Then join the march with Dee on the streets!

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep4 - EP104
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.
